data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Story DD Coverage
This task satisfies:
- DD4: unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic (workflow file structural test verifying the job exists, runs on Linux, and exports BASH_OPTS)

## Description
Modify tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh to add structural assertions for the new tests-pipefail-strict job that will be added to plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml.

The modified tests must FAIL (RED) before the implementation task adds the job to the template.

### Assertions to add

Add a test function `test_pipefail_strict_job_exists` and update the test header comment.

For each new test, use the same python3+yaml pattern as existing tests:

1. **test_pipefail_strict_job_exists** — `jobs['tests-pipefail-strict']` must exist in the parsed YAML
2. **test_pipefail_strict_runs_on_linux** — `jobs['tests-pipefail-strict']['runs-on']` must equal `ubuntu-latest`
3. **test_pipefail_strict_exports_bash_opts** — `jobs['tests-pipefail-strict']['env']['BASH_OPTS']` must contain `-eo pipefail`
4. **test_pipefail_strict_needs_lint_format** — `jobs['tests-pipefail-strict']['needs']` must contain `lint-format`
5. **test_pipefail_strict_uses_github_variable** — at least one `run:` step in `jobs['tests-pipefail-strict']` must contain the string `${{ vars.`
6. **test_pipefail_strict_no_continue_on_error** — `jobs['tests-pipefail-strict']` must NOT have `continue-on-error: true`

Update the header comment (tests #11-#16) to document the new tests.

Also update the test count in the header from "10" to appropriate count.

### File: tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh

Given/When/Then test approach:
- Given: the template YAML is missing the tests-pipefail-strict job (initial state)
- When: test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh is executed
- Then: the new test functions exit non-zero (RED) for each missing assertion

### RED marker
Update .test-index to add the RED marker for test_pipefail_strict_job_exists:
Change: `plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml:tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh`
To: `plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml:tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh [test_pipefail_strict_job_exists]`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh exits non-zero (RED state with the new assertions failing)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] test_pipefail_strict_job_exists function present in the test file
  Verify: grep -q 'test_pipefail_strict_job_exists' tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh
- [ ] test_pipefail_strict_no_continue_on_error function present
  Verify: grep -q 'continue.on.error' tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_pipefail_strict_job_exists] for plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml
  Verify: grep '\[test_pipefail_strict_job_exists\]' .test-index
- [ ] ruff check passes on any modified .py files (skip if none)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh — MODIFY (add 6 new test assertions)
- .test-index — MODIFY (add RED marker)

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
data.title: Update ci-dso-staged template tests to assert tests-pipefail-strict job
